title: companyStats
description: List of the statistics such as the average age, tenure, compensation of leadership, the number of executives, and the gender diversity of leadership for the requested identifier.

averageAge.description: Average of the executives on the management and board

maxAge.description: Maximum age of the people on Management & Board

minimumAge.description: Minimum age of the person on board

medianAge.description: Median age of the people on board

femaleBoardMembers.description: Number of female members on the board

femaleBoardMembersPercent.description: Percentage of female members on the board

mbType.description: Management and Board type, where MB = Management & Board, MGMT = Management, and BRD = Board. This is a pass-through value from the input used in the `mbType` query parameter.

requestId.description: Original identifier used for the request.
